allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add assistant watchMentions, followUp, replyMode and actions support

- Add watchMentions config for assistant-style replies when watched users are @mentioned
- Add @mention detection and resolution in group messages \(user and agent\)
- Add followUp window for automatic follow-up replies after bot interaction
- Add 5 replyMode options: ignore, record, mention-only, mention-and-watch, proactive
- Add ChannelMessageActionAdapter for LLM-initiated message sends
- Refactor logging: unified logVerbose\(\) and formatInfoflowError\(\)
- Update openclaw.plugin.json config schema with new group config format \(breaking change\)
- Add CHANGELOG.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
